---
title: "Matilda Bishop"
---

## Matilda Bishop

**Dates:** (b. Great Bookham 1831/2)

### Description

elementary school teacher

### Biography

She was a widow in Otterbourne at the time of the 1881 census.  Her husband, a ship’s steward, was at sea in 1871.  However this may be a different couple.

### Letters

- Letter from March 24th [1896?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Mar 5 1896
- Letter from Jan 29th [1896]
- Letter from Jan 23d 1896
- Letter from Novr 8 th 1878
- Letter from Sept 17th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
